pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.423) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Products. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Products roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Technical Foundations is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Products. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Products competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.423) and edge-domain placement (Technical Foundations) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Products. All passes support exclusion.
